TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hugh_Jackman, title = Hugh_Jackman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hugh_Jackman} }

S.FORM: Hugh Jackman kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 10, Hugh Michael Jackman, squliq na bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
Hugh Jackman kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 10, Hugh Michael Jackman, squliq na bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ħuɣħ *aʦ~ʨkman kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ħuɣħ miʦ~ʨħael *aʦ~ʨkman, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
